name: html-card-image-render
description: Render HTML/JSON/Markdown/TXT into polished card images.

scripts.test:render:json: node scripts/render_card_image.js --input examples/architecture_card.json --output verify_output/architecture_card.png --width 1800 --height 1100 --theme architect --puppeteer-config puppeteer-config.edge.windows.json
scripts.test:render:md: node scripts/render_card_image.js --input examples/code_card.md --output verify_output/code_card.png --width 1600 --height 1000 --theme sunset --puppeteer-config puppeteer-config.edge.windows.json
